positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a soaring stylized phoenix taking flight against a stylized cosmic nebula backdrop. The phoenix should be rendered with clean, dynamic, curving lines and a vibrant crimson and gold color palette, contrasted against deep indigo and midnight blue. Use negative space effectively to create a strong silhouette effect. Geometric and organic elements should intertwine. The composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for apparel printing. Intricate yet clean details, vector illustration style, high contrast, ethereal glow, magical realism, trending on ArtStation, perfect for t-shirt print.
